headline: How PNL grew organic clicks 266% in 6 months by publishing 30 AI-optimized blog posts monthly
result: PNL increased monthly organic clicks from 433 to 1,150 (+266%) and ranking keywords from 913 to 3,708 (+406%) within six months, with 2,158 clicks directly attributed to WP SEO AI content.
summary: PNL is a B2B foundation engineering specialist offering screw pile solutions as an eco-friendly alternative to traditional concrete foundations. The company faced stagnant organic traffic despite quality products and technical expertise, lacking the internal SEO capacity to capture high-intent B2B traffic during the awareness phase of the buyer's journey. By partnering with WP SEO AI to publish 30 targeted blog posts monthly, PNL achieved a 266% increase in organic clicks and positioned itself as a topical authority—with content now cited by Google AI Overview and ChatGPT.
